name: Whale Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Whale Shogi (Kujira Shogi, R. W. Schmittberger 1981): a 6x6 shogi variant with a whaling-themed army. Capture the opponent's White Whale. Captured pieces switch sides and are dropped like Shogi, but there is no promotion zone: the Porpoise promotes to a Killer Whale only when it is captured.
